purpose: Post-result diagnosis separating conservative calibration failure from the utility model and the frozen A/B/MERGED action-space ceiling. This was not preregistered and does not alter the REJECTED result.

primary_action_space_oracle.definition: Per query, take the maximum recall@10 among A, B, and MERGED using gold. This is an evaluation-only upper bound and is never executable.

standard_matrix_action_space_oracle.note: Some non-primary partition/k/seed cells have more oracle room, but the frozen primary min-over-datasets prediction is mathematically unreachable.

diagnostic_conclusion: The conformal radius is larger than every predicted test advantage, so the registered router correctly abstains everywhere.
Removing the radius does not improve overall recall on either dataset; selected positive-advantage cases are almost entirely recall ties.
The failure is therefore not fixed by merely loosening abstention.
On the fixed primary cohorts, even a gold oracle over A/B/MERGED cannot clear the registered +0.02 min-over-datasets threshold.
The next confirmatory branch must expand the action space through learned semantic weights or bounded topology/connectivity proposals rather than repeat a router-only threshold sweep.
